caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green tunic featuring a small, red and blue embroidered pattern along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. Across the sequence, the woman's facial expressions and mouth movements change as she speaks, with her eyes occasionally blinking. In the final frame, she raises her hand slightly into the frame, gesturing with her fingers as she continues talking. The lighting and camera angle remain constant throughout the clip, focusing on her from the chest up.
